title: Liberty Shoes is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Liberty Shoes is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Liberty Shoes! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Liberty Shoes:
Liberty Shoes is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes!
